notes: Documentation scope was limited to internal architecture guidance for Milestone 7 Subtask 1.

Docs explicitly preserve the additive boundary: installUI(ITacticalUI*) and getUI() form a wx-free seam, while the live tactical runtime still remains on FBattleScreen/FBattleBoard/FBattleDisplay.
